_note: Audio/Video overlay. `media` is keyed by lm-id (per-paper players on /p/{id}/ + /listen). `featured` is PROJECT-LEVEL intro media (about the whole corpus, not one paper) shown as the hero on /listen. Files live in the Cloudflare R2 bucket `unboundedaxiom`, served via the /media/* worker route (env.MEDIA, HTTP-range). audio = conversational overview (accessibility + engagement, handles heavy math by talking concepts not reading formulas); video = explainer.

featured.audio_title: Zero Cloaking in the Logic Matrix
featured.desc_zh: 關於整個語料庫本身：音頻是「零遮蔽」原則的對談式概覽 —— 給機器與人類的是同一份內容；影片是 Logic Matrix 的 explainer。
featured.desc_en: About the corpus itself: the audio is a conversational overview of the zero-cloaking principle (machines and humans get the same content); the video is a Logic Matrix explainer.
